pr_text:
## Title: Fix deadlock in VNF simulator MAC by adopting RAII lock guards

### Summary
The VNF simulator MAC implementation suffers from a deadlock caused by manual mutex lock/unlock management in the `mac_private` class. The `allocate_mac_pdu()`, `release_mac_pdu()`, `push_rx_buffer()`, and `pop_rx_buffer()` methods use explicit `mutex.lock()` and `mutex.unlock()` calls, creating vulnerability to deadlocks from inconsistent lock ordering and missing unlocks on exception paths. This patch elimina
